title: Genomic DNA extraction from mosquitoes
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9pnl4","text":"Heat dry block at 65o C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9jv07","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"971kk","text":"Fly Griding Buffer (Adjust pH to 9.2)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6vce0","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","5_0":"","5_1":""},"colWidths":[null,null],"data":[["\u0026nbsp;","For 100 mL"],["0.1M NaCl","584 mg"],["0.2M Sucrose","6.85g"],["0.1M Tris-HCl pH 9.1\n","1.21g"],["0.05M EDTA","1.861"],["0.5% SDS","5mL 10% SDS"]],"guid":"14A48ED0458011E99ACDFF15730CFDB3","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}}}}
steps: Freeze mosquitoes and separate 1 mosquito per tube. Add 25 uL of fly grinding buffer. Grind mosquitoes with a pestle.
Rinse pestle with 25 uL of buffer.
Centrifuge at max speed for 15 min at RT

Collect supernatant and add 0.7 vol (28 uL over 40 uL) of room temperature of isopropanol (or 1 vol of ice cold 100% EtOH) and incubate for 5 min at room temperature. Centrifuge at RT for 15 min at max speed. 00:05:00
creator: Fabio Gomes
